title: 7's House Latte
description: Double espresso pulled from single-estate Uva beans, steamed milk, finished with a leaf of latte art.

title: Hill Country Love Cake
description: Cashews, semolina and rosewater, baked slow the traditional way and cut generously for the road ahead.

title: Spiced Fish Cutlet Snack Box
description: Four crisp fish cutlets, a wedge of lime and house chili sauce — built to eat with one hand at a rest stop.
